label: Target Mapping
description: Maps protein targets to biological systems and assay metrics for metabolic balance and weight management formulations.

defaultInputs.name: Target/Protein Input
defaultInputs.tooltip: Optional input port carrying protein names or biological descriptions from previous steps.

defaultOutputs.name: Corresponding Assay
defaultOutputs.tooltip: Specific assay method used to measure the target.

defaultOutputs.name: Metric Used
defaultOutputs.tooltip: Measurement unit for the assay result (e.g. "IC50", "Fold activation").

defaultOutputs.name: Rationale for Deterrence
defaultOutputs.tooltip: Biological rationale explaining why this target is relevant to the formulation.

defaultOutputs.name: Crystalized Structure Available?
defaultOutputs.tooltip: Whether a crystalized structure is available for the target (e.g. "Yes", "Partially").

defaultOutputs.name: ChemBL ID
defaultOutputs.tooltip: ChemBL database identifier for the target.

defaultOutputs.name: Protein Structure
defaultOutputs.tooltip: URL to the PDB structure file for the target.

configSchema.label: Search
configSchema.placeholder: Enter target name or biological effect...
configSchema.tooltip: Use this when you want to type a target or biological effect manually instead of wiring it from another node.
